arts.ttl: Serie A | Como v Udinese: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season reaches its midpoint, ambitious Como welcome mid-table Udinese to the Stadio Sinigaglia on Monday evening in a match that could have significant implications for both sides' campaigns. The post Serie A | Como v Udinese: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: ‘I saw the ball there and just decided to go for it’ - James Abankwah on getting booked seconds into his Watford debut
arts.sum: Abankwah (21) completed his loan move from Udinese, Watford’s sister club, only last week, following Ebosele who made a similar switch earlier this season but was pitched straight into the first team by Cleverley for Watford’s game away to Derby County, and a clean sheet was a platform for the side to go on and take home a 2-0 win. Abankwah’s Ireland U-21 teammate Sam Curtis also enjoyed a successful debut, for St Johnstone, with a win and a clean sheet in their Scottish FA Cup tie at home to Motherwell.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fàbregas: “Real Madrid can buy Nico Paz back, but at a certain price”
arts.sum: While Real Madrid retains a buy-back clause, Fàbregas made it clear in a recent press conference that Paz is at the heart of Como’s long-term vision. Como 1907 head coach Cesc Fàbregas has lavished praise on Nico Paz, the Argentine midfielder who has emerged as one of Serie A’s brightest talents this season.
